nodes.context: The Kray twins' gang based in Bethnal Green, involved in murder, armed robbery, arson, protection rackets, gambling and assaults.
A rival gang to the Krays' Firm, formed by Charlie Richardson.
Governing body of organized crime in the United States, allied with the Kray twins in the 1960s.
Montreal-based Mafia family, satellite of the Bonanno crime family, involved in bond robberies and dealings with the Krays.
New York Mafia family, parent organization of the Cotroni crime family.

edges.context: The Richardson Gang was a rival of the Krays’ Firm.
The Kray twins formed an alliance with the American Mafia's Commission in the 1960s, involving money laundering and stolen bonds.
The Cotroni crime family was a Canadian satellite of the Bonanno crime family.
The Cotroni family sold stolen bonds in Britain through the Krays, who redeemed them for profit.
